translations.landing.sponsor.hero.title: Sponsor Flyto2
translations.landing.sponsor.hero.description: Flyto2 is open source and free to use. Your sponsorship helps us keep building and improving the platform for everyone.
translations.landing.sponsor.why.title: Why Sponsor?
translations.landing.sponsor.why.subtitle: Your support directly funds the development and maintenance of Flyto2.
translations.landing.sponsor.why.openSource.title: Open Source Development
translations.landing.sponsor.why.openSource.descripti: Keep flyto-core free and open source. Fund new modules, bug fixes, and performance improvements.
translations.landing.sponsor.why.docs.title: Documentation & Tutorials
translations.landing.sponsor.why.docs.description: Better docs, video tutorials, and examples so more people can benefit from automation.
translations.landing.sponsor.why.infra.title: Infrastructure
translations.landing.sponsor.why.infra.description: CI/CD, testing infrastructure, PyPI hosting, and community tooling all cost money to run.
translations.landing.sponsor.how.title: How to Support
translations.landing.sponsor.how.github.title: GitHub Sponsors
translations.landing.sponsor.how.github.description: The easiest way to sponsor. Monthly or one-time. GitHub matches your first sponsorship.
translations.landing.sponsor.how.star.title: Star & Share
translations.landing.sponsor.how.star.description: Not ready for financial support? Star our repo and share Flyto2 with others. It helps more than you think.
translations.landing.sponsor.how.contribute.title: Contribute
translations.landing.sponsor.how.contribute.descripti: Submit PRs, report bugs, improve documentation, or build modules. Every contribution counts.
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.title: What Your Sponsorship Supports
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.core.title: flyto-core
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.core.descriptio: The open source execution engine with 400+ automation modules, MCP-native, published on PyPI.
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.indexer.title: flyto-indexer
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.indexer.descrip: Code intelligence MCP server for impact analysis, dependency tracking, and code quality insights.
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.vscode.title: flyto-vscode
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.vscode.descript: VSCode extension for enterprise security analysis, powered by AI agents.
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.cloud.title: flyto-cloud
translations.landing.sponsor.projects.cloud.descripti: Desktop app and web platform for building, running, and managing automation workflows.
translations.landing.sponsor.cta.title: Every Bit Counts
translations.landing.sponsor.cta.description: Whether it's $1/month or a one-time star, your support keeps Flyto2 alive and growing.
